# Reference
## Accounts
<details><summary><code>client.accounts.<a href="src/fern/accounts/client.py">createaccount</a>(...)</code></summary>
<dl>
<dd>

#### 🔌 Usage

<dl>
<dd>

<dl>
<dd>

```python
from fern import FernApi

client = FernApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.accounts.createaccount(
    username="username",
    password="password",
)

```
</dd>
</dl>
</dd>
</dl>
